name: spice-retention
description: Retention service operations for Spice Digital (MBFS, HealthNut, Ahipoki) across Thanx, Toast, Klaviyo, and SMS. Briefs, reports, meeting prep, health checks, flow design, and the Ahipoki Klaviyo migration. Uses Klaviyo + Figma + Google Drive + Notion + Slack MCPs where available, falls back to Chrome navigation for Thanx and Toast.
